holdings.infoBox: INDY is an equity ETF with a total of 56 individual holdings. The top holdings are HDFC Bank stock at 10.92%, ICICI Bank at 8.66%, Reliance Industries at 8.16%, Bharti Airtel at 5.22%, and Larsen & Toubro at 4.48%.

overview.description: The iShares India 50 ETF (INDY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nifty 50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of 50 blue-chip companies traded on the National Stock Exchange of India. INDY was launched on Nov 18, 2009 and is issued by BlackRock.
